script_text: When you learn a new word, use it!
The more you use a word, the more it sticks.
Different situations call for different words.
Talking to a friend? Use chill words. Writing an essay? Use fancier ones.
Instead of happy, you could say joyful, thrilled, or proud.
Each one paints a slightly different picture!
Pick one new word each day. Use it in a sentence!
Now you are ready to use smart words!
